name: Mustafa YILMAZ
htmlContent:
MUSTAFA YILMAZ

SAP Certified ABAP Consultant | EWM ABAP Specialist

✆ +371 20 216 464 | ✉ mustafa.yilmaz@debuggertr.com | ● Riga, Latvia

LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/abapmustafa | Web: www.debuggertr.com

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Dynamic SAP ABAP professional with 13+ years of experience in SAP development, specializing in Extended Warehouse Management (EWM). Co-founder of DebuggerTR Consulting with an extensive project portfolio across 30+ international enterprises including Boston Scientific, Siemens, Unilever, Mercedes-Benz, Swarovski, CocaCola, Essity, and L’Oréal. Proven leadership capabilities as Technical Lead and Team Lead with strong expertise in EWM ABAP, SAP Adobe Forms, MFS, WFI, and S/4HANA migration.

CORE COMPETENCIES

▪ EWM ABAP Development

▪ SAP Adobe Forms

▪ MFS / RF Framework

▪ WFI (Floor Integration)

▪ S/4HANA Migration

▪ SAP Interface (IDoc/RFC)

▪ IS-U (Industry Utilities)

▪ PPF / Output Mgmt

▪ Data Migration / ETL

▪ Team Leadership

▪ ZUGFeRD e-Invoicing

▪ Project Management

MUSTAFA YILMAZ – PROJECT PORTFOLIO

Detailed project overview with SAP module coverage. Ordered by most recent first. Click any project link in the CV to jump here.

EWM ABAP Developer @ DebuggerTR Consulting (via Westernacher)

2025 – Present | Remote

EWM ABAP Developer @ DebuggerTR Consulting (via Westernacher)

2024 | Remote

EWM ABAP Developer @ DebuggerTR Consulting (via Westernacher)

2023 – 2024 | Remote

Modules: EWM · AMS · CR/CI

Application Management Services (AMS) for EWM system. Handling Change Requests (CR) and Continuous Improvement (CI) tickets. Bug fixing, performance optimization, and enhancement implementations.

EWM ABAP Developer @ DebuggerTR Consulting (via Westernacher)

2023 | Remote

2022 – 2023 | Sweden / France (Gien)

Modules: EWM · MFS · PPF · Adobe Forms

Multi-site EWM implementation across Essity’s Swedish and French (MA Gien) facilities. Floor Plan (FP) development, warehouse process automation, and PPF action scheduling for print and output management.

[P07] Kwizda

Senior EWM ABAP Consultant @ DebuggerTR Consulting (via Westernacher)

2022 | Remote

Modules: EWM · ABAP OO · RF/MFS

EWM rollout project (EWM_2022). Development of custom EWM functionalities, RF framework configuration and mobile device integration for warehouse floor operations.

[P08] Great Lakes Cheese

Senior ABAP Consultant @ DebuggerTR Consulting (via Westernacher)

2022 – Present | Remote

Modules: EWM · WM · ABAP OO

EWM implementation and custom ABAP development for warehouse operations at one of America’s largest cheese manufacturers. Design and development of custom warehouse processes, goods movement optimization, and reporting solutions.

[P09] Siemens

June 2022 – September 2023 | Riga, Latvia

Modules: SAP Interfaces · ABAP OO · IDoc · RFC/BAPI

LDA (Logistics Data Automation) project at Siemens. Led the SAP interface development team, designing and implementing interfaces between SAP and external systems using IDoc, RFC, BAPI, and custom ABAP solutions.

[P10] Arvato Systems – Multiple Projects

SAP Technical Lead / Senior ABAP Consultant @ Arvato Systems Latvia

Modules: S/4HANA · IS-U · ABAP OO · ZUGFeRD · Adobe Forms

Led QA and ABAP Development teams across multiple projects: S/4HANA conversion, SIMS, Lekarland, ZUGFeRD (e-Invoicing with German standard), ISU (Industry Solution Utilities), and Apollo project. Responsible for code reviews, technical architecture, and team mentoring.

February 2018 – January 2019 | Latvia

AS Vendor Consolidation project for Swarovski. Led the ABAP development team for vendor master data consolidation, procurement process optimization, and supplier management automation.

SAP ABAP development and consulting for Unilever’s Turkey operations. Module-specific custom development, report creation, and enhancement implementations.

2016 | Turkey

Modules: FI/CO · ABAP OO · SAP Interfaces

SAP ABAP consulting for Mercedes-Benz Finance Turkey. Financial module development, reporting, and interface development for automotive finance operations.

SAP ABAP Application Consultant @ Arete Consulting

May 2013 – April 2015 | İstanbul, Turkey

Modules: IS-U · ERP · WM · RF · DM · BI

SAP (ERP+IS-U) Implementation project. Development across WM (Warehouse Management), RF (Radio Frequency), DM (Device Management), and BI (Business Intelligence). Full lifecycle implementation for gas distribution utility.

name: Melis YILMAZ
htmlContent:
MELİS YILMAZ

SAP EWM Consultant | Business Analyst

☎ +371 259 10814 | ✉ melis.akdmr@gmail.com | ● Riga, Latvia

LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/melisyilmaz | Web: www.debuggertr.com

Professional Summary

SAP EWM Consultant and Business Analyst with 7+ years of experience across SAP EWM implementations, SAP Hybris/CX e-commerce, and backend development. Co-Founder of DebuggerTR Consulting, SAP Certified in EWM with S/4HANA. Experienced in warehouse strategies, EWM RF handheld screen design, putaway and picking strategies, and end-to-end B2B/B2C e-commerce solutions. Proficient in Jira, Scrum, Agile, and MS Visio for project delivery across aviation, retail, and manufacturing industries.

Core Competencies

  • SAP EWM (Certified)
  • SAP Hybris / CX
  • ABAP Development
  • EWM RF / Handheld Design
  • Business Analysis
  • E-Commerce Development
  • Jira / Scrum / Agile
  • Project Management
  • Test Analysis
